ype":"uint64","name":"newMinApy","type":"uint64"}],"name":"SetMinApy","type":"event"},{"anonymous":false,"inputs":[{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"caller","type":"address"},{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"pool","type":"address"}],"name":"SetPool","type":"event"},{"anonymous":false,"inputs":[{"indexed":false,"internalType":"uint64","name":"newMinApy","type":"uint64"},{"indexed":false,"internalType":"uint64","name":"validAt","type":"uint64"}],"name":"SubmitMinApy","type":"event"},{"anonymous":false,"inputs":[{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"pool","type":"address"},{"indexed":false,"internalType":"uint64","name":"validAt","type":"uint64"}],"name":"SubmitPendingPool","type":"event"},{"anonymous":false,"inputs":[{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"caller","type":"address"},{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"recipient","type":"address"},{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"order","type":"address"},{"indexed":false,"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"},{"indexed":false,"internalType":"uint256","name":"shares","type":"uint256"}],"name":"WithdrawFts","type":"event"}],"devdoc":{"details":"This interface defines events emitted by the TermMax Vault V2 contract for:      - Pool whitelist management with timelock mechanism      - Order lifecycle management (creation, redemption, configuration updates)      - APY and idle fund rate parameter changes with timelock approval      - Interest accrual and performance fee calculations      Events are organized into logical groups for easier tracking and monitoring      of vault operations and governance activities.","events":{"AccruedInterest(uint256,uint256)":{"details":"This event tracks the vault's interest accrual process, showing how the      accreting principal grows over time and performance fees are calculated.      This is typically emitted during deposit/withdrawal operations or periodic updates.","params":{"newAccretingPrincipal":"The updated total accreting principal after interest accrual","newPerformanceFee":"The updated accumulated performance fee amount"}},"NewOrderCreated(address,address,address)":{"details":"This event tracks the creation of new TermMax orders within the vault system,      linking them to their associated market for monitoring and management.","params":{"caller":"The address that initiated the order creation (typically vault operator)","market":"The address of the TermMax market where the order will operate","order":"The address of the newly deployed order contract"}},"OrdersConfigurationUpdated(address,address[])":{"details":"This event tracks batch updates to order parameters including liquidity settings,      fee structures, risk parameters, and other operational configurations.","params":{"caller":"The operator who executed the configuration updates (typically vault management)","orders":"The addresses of all orders whose configurations were updated"}},"OrdersLiquidityRemoved(address,address[],uint256[])":{"details":"This event tracks batch liquidity removals from orders, indicating the amounts      withdrawn and the orders affected.","params":{"caller":"The operator who executed the liquidity removals (typically vault management)","orders":"The addresses of all orders from which liquidity was removed","removedLiquidities":"The amounts of liquidity removed from each corresponding order"}},"RedeemOrder(address,address,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"This event tracks the redemption of orders, including any bad debt that occurred      and the actual collateral amount delivered back to the vault.","params":{"badDebt":"The amount of bad debt associated with the order (losses not covered by collateral)","caller":"The address that initiated the order redemption","diliveryAmount":"The amount of collateral successfully delivered back to the vault","order":"The address of the order contract being redeemed"}},"RevokePendingMinApy(address)":{"details":"This event is fired when governance cancels a proposed minimum APY change      before the timelock expires, preventing the change from taking effect.","params":{"caller":"The address that initiated the revocation (typically governance)"}},"RevokePendingPool(address)":{"details":"This event is fired when governance or guardian cancels a proposed pool change","params":{"caller":"The address that initiated the revocation"}},"SetMinApy(address,uint64)":{"details":"This event confirms that a proposed minimum APY change has been accepted      and applied after the timelock period elapsed.","params":{"caller":"The address that executed the APY update (typically governance)","newMinApy":"The new minimum APY value that is now active"}},"SetPool(address,address)":{"details":"This event is fired when the vault operator sets a new pool for managing idle funds,      allowing the vault to earn floating interest on its assets.","params":{"caller":"The address that called the function to set the pool","pool":"The address of the newly set pool"}},"SubmitMinApy(uint64,uint64)":{"details":"This event initiates the governance process for changing the vault's minimum APY,      starting the timelock period to allow for community review and feedback.","params":{"newMinApy":"The proposed minimum APY value (e.g., 5% APY = 0.05e8)","validAt":"The timestamp when the minimum APY change will become valid and executable"}},"SubmitPendingPool(address,uint64)":{"details":"This event is fired when governance proposes to add or remove a pool from      the whitelist, initiating the timelock period for security.","params":{"pool":"The address of the pool proposed for whitelist status change","validAt":"The timestamp when the whitelist change will become valid and can be executed"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"Vault Events V2 Interface","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"AccruedInterest(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when interest is accrued and performance fees are calculated"},"NewOrderCreated(address,address,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when a new order is successfully created and deployed"},"OrdersConfigurationUpdated(address,address[])":{"notice":"Emitted when order configurations are updated"},"OrdersLiquidityRemoved(address,address[],uint256[])":{"notice":"Emitted when liquidity is removed from multiple orders"},"RedeemOrder(address,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when an order is redeemed and settled"},"RevokePendingMinApy(address)":{"notice":"Emitted when a pending minimum APY change is revoked"},"RevokePendingPool(address)":{"notice":"Emitted when a pending pool is revoked"},"SetMinApy(address,uint64)":{"notice":"Emitted when the minimum APY is successfully updated"},"SetPool(address,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when a pool is set as the active vault pool"},"SubmitMinApy(uint64,uint64)":{"notice":"Emitted when a new minimum APY is proposed for timelock approval"},"SubmitPendingPool(address,uint64)":{"notice":"Emitted when a pool whitelist change is submitted for timelock approval"}},"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Additional events for TermMax vault V2
